title: prasoxylon angustifolium
intro: Prasoxylon angustifolium is a plant species from the family of Polygalaceae, commonly known as the prairie milkpea, which is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Prasoxylon angustifolium include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Prasoxylon angustifolium is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential benefits.
